description_long: This is a ceramic cup with a slightly irregular rim and a sturdy handle, featuring a distinctive blue and white color scheme. The exterior is decorated with a whimsical illustration of people, animals, and trees, rendered in various shades of blue against a white background. The interior of the cup is plain white, with some visible staining and a printed logo and text reading 'Douwe Egberts' along with a circular emblem. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the cup's body, providing a comfortable grip. The cup's surface appears hard and smooth, with a matte to slightly glossy finish. The overall form is typical of a standard coffee or tea cup, suitable for holding hot beverages.
description: A blue and white ceramic cup with a whimsical illustrated pattern, a sturdy handle, and visible branding inside.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's interior with the 'Douwe Egberts' logo and some staining, as well as the rim's irregularity.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the handle and part of the exterior illustration, including stacked teacups and a dark blue background.
description_view_2: The handle is fully visible, and the main exterior artwork with animals and trees is prominent.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side of the cup, showing more of the illustrated scene with people and trees.
